urdu transliteration text:
Faras Ki Zeen Se Beshak Utar Gaye Hai Husain(a.S)
Hussein has definitely come off the horse's saddle

english translation text:
Zameen Dhoondh Rahi Hai Kidhar Gaye Hai Husan(a.S)
But the ground is looking for Hussain.

urdu transliteration text: Hussein has definitely come off the horse's saddle
english translation text: Faras Ki Zen Se Beshak Utargaye Hai Husain(a.S)

urdu transliteration text: Karega Shimr Ka Khanjar To Sirf Sar Ko Juda
english translation text: Shimars dagger will only separate the head from His body

urdu transliteration text: Wagar Na Laashae Akbar Pe Margaye Hai Husain(a.S)
english translation text: But Hussain has actually died(spiritually) near the body of Hz Aliakber.

urdu transliteration text: Sare Burida Kate Hot Khoon Chehre Par
english translation text: His head is severed, his lips torn and there is blood on his face

Ajeeb Haal Me Shiri Ke Ghar Aye Hai Husain(a.S)
What a strange way to go to the house of Sheerin, oh Hussain

urdu transliteration text: Mai Milne Shaam Ke Zindaa Me Aaunga Tujhse
english translation text: I will come to meet you in the prison of Shaam

Ye Baat Aakhri Beti Se Kargaye Hai Husain(a.S)
These were the last words to his daughter from Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Kahi Hai Qasimo Abbas Aur Kahi Akbar
Qasim is at one place, Abbas at another and Akbar somewhere else

english translation text: Kaha Kaha Tere Tukde Pade Hue Hai Husain(a.S)

urdu transliteration text: Qaza Ke Baad Bhi Bhai Behen Ke Saath Raha
english translation text: Even after his death the brother and sister stayed together

urdu transliteration text:
Jidhar Jidhar Gayi Zainab Udhar Gaye Hai Husain(a.S)
Wherever Zainab went, Hussain went too.
Kisi Ne Maara Hai Pathhar Behen Ke Kya Akbar
english translation text: Somebody hit a stone on his sister, oh Akbar

urdu transliteration text: Ke Karte Karte Tilawat Thahar Gaye Hai Husain
english translation text: That’s why Hussain has suddenly stopped reciting the Quran
